case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. VANESSA AQUINO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SARAH HEYWORTH, SR. COLLECTION OFFICER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE, REPRESENTED BY SARAH HEYWORTH, SR. COLLECTION OFFICER IS PRESENT AND MAKES AN ORAL REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL. DEFENDANT VANESSA AQUINO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,153.41 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT AQUINO, VANESSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
